answer:
The correct answer is **\boxed{A}**.

The integers \( k \) satisfying \(-21 < k < 24\) range from \(-20\) to \(23\), which is symmetric around \(-0.5\). The sum of all integers in this symmetric range is \(0\).

*(Note: The range \(-20\) to \(23\) includes \(-20, -19, \ldots, 0, \ldots, 22, 23\), and their sum cancels out to \(0\).)*
